In Remembrance of the Ferguson Centenary.

My true compatriot and friend,
At last to end her dilly-dallying,

} Our Ferguson, I sailed the sea!

* Till now but yesterday it seems,
Since March’s flickering beams before,
Thy steedless, space-devouring car
Flashed us to far, still Dunegore.
